name: Identify, Prioritize and Aggregate Pharma Supply Chain Requirements with GxP Compliance
description: This process involves collecting and prioritizing demand signals across the pharmaceutical supply chain, ensuring compliance with GxP regulations, and maintaining batch traceability, audit trails, and electronic signatures. It also includes validation documentation, deviation management, and a CAPA process to ensure the quality and integrity of pharmaceutical products.
regulatory_requirements: 21 CFR Part 11 electronic signature and record-keeping
notes: All automated decisions must be validated and documented per GxP, with a focus on batch traceability, audit trails, and electronic signatures. The system must also ensure data integrity, security, and compliance with regulatory requirements.
